projects.name: CS61B Lab&Proj
projects.summary: CS61B is one of the most famous courses in UC Berkeley which is focused on data structures. The best project is called ”gitlet”(Project2) asking students to implement most features of Git. I completed this by myself and wrote a design document.

projects.name: CRSLab
projects.summary: CRSLab is an open-source toolkit for building Conversational Recommender System (CRS). It is developed based on Python and PyTorch. This project has 400+ stars on GitHub (https://github.com/RUCAIBox/CRSLab). I have been one of the maintainers for 6 months.
